description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:8 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a job named job1 that runs only on the master branch and executes ./gradlew groovydoc then ./gradlew jars pom. In the test stage add a job named testjob that runs ./gradlew test. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
